samples.target_compile_errors:
error[E0277]: `main` has invalid return type `i32`
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/expressions/simple_asgn_2/sample_001/target.rs:1:14
  |
1 | fn main() -> i32 {
  |              ^^^ `main` can only return types that implement `Termination`
  |
  = help: consider using `()`, or a `Result`

error[E0604]: only `u8` can be cast as `char`, not `i32`
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/expressions/simple_asgn_2/sample_001/target.rs:8:9
  |
8 |     c = i as char;
  |         ^^^^^^^^^ invalid cast
  |
help: consider using `char::from_u32` instead (via a `u32`)
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/expressions/simple_asgn_2/sample_001/target.rs:8:9

8 |     c = i as char;
